Vista Weather

See the weather
through the beauty
of each place.

A weather app that sets every forecast against a photograph of where you are.

Download on App Store
No spam · One letter at launch

Why Vista Weather

Designed by a data scientist to deliver clear, powerful, and beautiful forecasts.

I have often felt underwhelmed by the design, accuracy, and clutter of typical weather apps. Most of them force you to dig around just to answer the most basic questions:

  • Will it rain?
  • When will it start?
  • When will it stop?

I decided to build my own. Vista Weather is designed to help you understand the weather in just a couple of seconds, while still offering advanced tools when you want to go deeper. The main idea is simple: weather should be easy to read at a glance.

01 / FORECAST CLARITY

Hyper-local rain forecasts

Get minute-by-minute rain forecasts for the next 4 hours, displaying exactly when precipitation starts and stops.

02 / MODEL CONSENSUS

Compare Forecasts

View forecasts side-by-side across multiple data sources to understand uncertainty and different outcomes.

03 / GLOBAL DATA

Most Advanced Data Sources

Provides forecasts from leading global models like Foreca alongside premier national bureaus—including the NWS (US), Deutscher Wetterdienst (DE), KNMI (Netherlands), and MET Norway.

04 / EXTENDED OUTLOOK

30-Day Window

Plan ahead with a complete 30-day forecast view that lets you anticipate trends far in advance.

05 / SYSTEM INTEGRATION

Home Screen Widgets

Access weather updates instantly with beautifully designed widgets that bring clarity directly to your home screen.

06 / BEAUTIFUL PHOTOS

Contextual Backdrops

Curated photography from Pexels and Unsplash dynamically shows images matching your location, nearby cities, or current nature scenes.

Vista Weather © 2026
Now Available on iOS
